case_title: COONEY AND PHAIR A CERTIFIED PUBLIC ACCOUNTANTS VS DOUGLAS KAREN DBA BELLINI JUVENILE DESIGNER FURN

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,049.00 FILED BY COONEY AND PHAIR A CERTIFIED PUBLIC ACCOUNTANTS AS TO DEFENDANT DOUGLAS KAREN DBA BELLINI JUVENILE DESIGNER FURN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-08-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 04

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COONEY AND PHAIR A CERTIFIED PUBLIC ACCOUNTANTS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DOUGLAS KAREN DBA BELLINI JUVENILE DESIGNER FURN $4,049.00 PRINCIPAL, $82.65 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,131.65 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
